mapper.sql: id, code, name, description, content, create_time, modify_time, creator, modifier, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM workflows WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY modify_time DESC

SELECT
FROM workflows WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflows (code, name, description, content, creator, modifier, deleted) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{content}, #{creator}, #{modifier}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), description = VALUES(description), content = VALUES(content), modifier = VALUES(modifier), deleted = 0, modify_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE workflows SET deleted = 1 WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM workflows WHERE deleted = 0
AND (code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY modify_time DESC
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workflows ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID', code VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE COMMENT '工作流编码，唯一标识', name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '工作流名称', description TEXT COMMENT '工作流描述', content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '工作流内容（YAML格式）', create_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', modify_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '修改时间', creator VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '创建人', modifier VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '修改人', deleted TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '逻辑删除：0-未删除，1-已删除', INDEX idx_code (code) COMMENT '编码索引', INDEX idx_create_time (create_time) COMMENT '创建时间索引', INDEX idx_modify_time (modify_time) COMMENT '修改时间索引', INDEX idx_deleted (deleted) COMMENT '逻辑删除索引' ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='工作流配置表'
